Moleculizer downloads

This is a preliminary release of Moleculizer; it's definitely "dot-oh" software! At this point, many things are still missing:

  • Build and installation instructions are pretty minimal.
  • The web-server based version of the software is still under construction.
  • The build has only been done under SuSe Linux; even then it's still a little tricky!

Save the link to get the file!

  • moleculizer 1.0 source
  • moleculizer 1.0 standalone binary
  • libxml++ parsing library v. 1.0.0
  • moleculizer 1.0.1 source
  • moleculizer 1.0.1 standalone binary

What's new in 1.0.1?

  1. In response to reviewer's comments, the reaction rate extrapolation algorithm is user-selectable in each reaction generator element.

    At present, this makes a difference only for generators of binary-type reactions.

  2. Improved use of "make" in build.

    Build time is much shorter, and there is less meaningless output while make is running. Make is now used in a "top-down" approach that is very tidy and efficient, but still uses a few special features of gnu make.
